description: Martial techniques, weapon mastery, and battlefield tactics honed through physical training and combat experience.
abilities: Charge
Full speed, straight ahead, through whatever stands in the way. Anyone caught in the path goes down hard, and the ones still standing wish they had moved.
Counter Attack
A failed strike is a gift. The blow slides past, and the counter arrives before the attacker realizes their mistake. Overextension has consequences.
Deadeye
One shot, one joint. A stillness between heartbeats, then a release that finds the exact tendon or gap chosen. Supernatural aim that borders on cruel.
Death Hand
A hand cannon guided by silent magic. One perfect shot at any visible distance. Then silence, a slow recharge, and the next target's time running out.
Defy Death
The killing blow lands. The body doesn't fall. Sheer conviction holds life together by a thread, but each refusal draws hungry attention from something that watches.
Disarm
A twist of the wrist and the weapon is gone. Claimed or clattering across stone, it doesn't matter. What matters is the empty hand left behind.
Duel
Sheer presence locks a foe into single combat. Expected strikes deflect harmlessly. Unexpected ones land with devastating certainty.
Farshot
The world narrows to a single bright point. Senses sharpen beyond natural limits, and a ranged strike reaches well past where anyone thought it could.
Flow
A perfect strike ignites something. Momentum carries the body into a flurry against everything in reach, each blow flowing seamlessly from the last.
Focus
Transcendent calm where strikes flow with lethal precision and lesser foes cannot land a blow. Even poisons burn away through sheer concentrated will.
Intercept
The instant an ally is struck, the fighter is already moving. Stepping into the blow's path is instinct. Absorbing it is the price of loyalty.
Limit Break
Mind and body achieve transcendent unity. Groups of lesser foes scatter. A single enemy faces relentless strikes. Impossible feats of strength become briefly possible.
Nemesis
A creature marked as personal quarry. Instinct tingles whenever it draws near, even hidden, even invisible. No concealment survives within striking distance.
Overpower
Raw brute force seizes a foe and slams them into submission. Pinned against the ground, locked in iron, wrenched into helpless surrender.
Provoke
Cutting words or brazen gestures so infuriating the target forgets everyone else exists. All that fury, all that attention, aimed at one fighter by choice.
Retreat
Drawing every enemy's rage to create one desperate opening. An ally escapes. A parting blow lands. The sacrifice is always worth the cost.
Slayer
A whirlwind of steel and motion cuts through a group of lesser foes before they raise their guard. Half fall in the first rotation.
Sneak Attack
The blindside is where the real work happens. A punishing wound, a pressure-point drop, or a silent kill, depending on how personal it needs to be.
Stalk
A careful hunt through wilderness, companions hidden and silent. When the quarry appears, even one preparing its own ambush, the hunter strikes first.
Steel Pact
A mystical bond forged with a chosen weapon. Always sensed, always felt. The bond steadies errant strikes, and true blows against lesser foes become lethal.
Technique
Years of discipline turned the body itself into a weapon. Fists, elbows, knees, and feet deliver force with the precision of sharpened steel.
Whirlwind
A sweeping rotation so swift the air whistles, striking everything in reach. Devastating, but overextension risks turning that spinning momentum against the fighter.
Wild Attack
Reckless, overwhelming power with no thought for defense. A devastating blow, a dangerous overextension, or a shattered weapon. The outcome surprises everyone.
Yawp
A war cry that shakes the ground and the resolve of everyone who hears it. Common folk cower. Lesser foes break and flee. A poor showing invites mockery.
